VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Protein complex prediction with AlphaFold-Multimer" is a real bioRxiv preprint (DOI: 10.1101/2021.10.04.463034), authored by Richard Evans, Michael O'Neill, Alexander Pritzel, and others from DeepMind, matching the cited authors. The automated checkers likely missed it due to capitalization or database indexing variations.
LINK: https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2021.10.04.463034v2
